//: Minimal, focused config: ENFORCE the no-hardcoded-color rule (CLAUDE.md gotcha #7 / PERF001). Not the full standard ruleset — we don't want to flag pre-existing style nits, only hardcoded colors. All colors must be design tokens: var(--…) from libs/ui-kit/src/lib/styles/_palette.scss.

color-no-hex.message: No hardcoded hex colors. Use a design token: var(--…) from _palette.scss. Need a new color? Add it to _palette.scss first. (CLAUDE.md #7 / PERF001)

color-named.message: No named colors. Use a design token: var(--…) from _palette.scss. (CLAUDE.md #7 / PERF001)

function-disallowed-list.message: No raw hsl()/hsla(). Use a design token: var(--…), or rgba(var(--x-rgb), a). (CLAUDE.md #7 / PERF001)
